subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter hath been received in these days, and from its meanings the hearts have gained solace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما در این ایام وارد و از معانیش قلوب تسلی حاصل نمود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
